ddls:
CREATE TABLE "phd_awards" (
  "phd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PhD record */,
  "broad_field_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the broad field category */,
  "major_field_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the major field category */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific field of study */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the PhD was awarded */,
  "n_phds" INTEGER /* Number of PhDs awarded in that year */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution awarding the PhD */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the PhD recipient */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the PhD recipient */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the PhD */,
  "research_topic" TEXT /* Brief description of the research topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phd_awards_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES fields_of_study ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phd_awards_broad_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("broad_field_id") REFERENCES broad_fields ("broad_field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phd_awards_major_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_field_id") REFERENCES major_fields ("major_field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phd_awards_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phd_awards_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutional_data ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "broad_fields" (
  "broad_field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each broad field */,
  "broad_field_name" TEXT /* Name of the broad field (e.g., Life sciences) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the broad field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("broad_field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "major_fields" (
  "major_field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each major field */,
  "broad_field_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the broad field category */,
  "major_field_name" TEXT /* Name of the major field (e.g., Agricultural sciences and natural resources) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the major field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fields_of_study" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specific field */,
  "major_field_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the major field category */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the specific field (e.g., Agricultural economics) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the specific field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which doctoral degrees were awarded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, institutional representative) */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutional_data ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "phd_id" INTEGER /* ID of the PhD record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the record */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_phd_id FOREIGN KEY ("phd_id") REFERENCES phd_awards ("phd_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutional_data" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "total_phds" INTEGER /* Total number of PhDs awarded by the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution (e.g., city, state) */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the institution's website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the institution's representative */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the institution */,
  "total_faculty" INTEGER /* Total number of faculty members in the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)
